query:
WITH target AS MATERIALIZED (
                                SELECT id, state, attempt_id
                                FROM requests
                                WHERE id = $1
                                FOR UPDATE
                            ),
                            updated AS (
                                UPDATE requests r
                                SET state = 'pending',
                                    retry_attempt = $2,
                                    not_before = $3,
                                    daemon_id = NULL,
                                    attempt_id = NULL,
                                    processing_admission_id = NULL,
                                    claimed_at = NULL,
                                    started_at = NULL
                                FROM target t
                                WHERE r.id = t.id
                                  AND t.state = 'claimed'
                                  AND t.attempt_id = $4
                                RETURNING r.id
                            )
                            SELECT
                                EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM target) AS "exists!",
                                EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM updated) AS "applied!"
